en: But with this competition coming up, I just want to make very sure this chart is in the best shape it can be.
ja: この譜面が最高の状態か確認したいんだ。
zhTW: 我只想確保這個譜子是最好的狀態。
vi: toi chi muon chac chan ban nhac nay tot nhat co the.

en: Yeah, this one right here, right? I gave Connolly the chart this morning.
All I want to do now is just give you both a crack at it, all right? So, Neiman, go ahead.
ko: 지금 내가 원하는 건 너희 둘에게 기회를 주는 거야. 알겠지?
ja: 今やりたいのは二人にやらせてみること。いいね？
zhTW: 我現在只想讓你們兩個都試試。好嗎？
vi: Tat ca nhung gi toi muon la cho ca hai ban thu. Duoc chu?

en: Jump on the kit. We'll take it from the top. OK.
I don't want you to worry about hits right now. Just tempo, OK? OK.
ja: 今はヒットを気にしなくていい。
vi: Bay gio dung lo ve cac nhip danh.

en: Not quite my tempo. Connolly? OK.
ja: ちょっと違うな。コネリー？
vi: Khong dung nhip cua toi. Connelly?

en: Yeah, I'll take it right back from the top. I can do it.
vi: OK, toi se lam lai tu dau.

en: No, we'll go with Connolly now.
ja: いや、今はコネリーでいく。
